meta_data.format_description: tensorQTL cis-nominal mode with interaction term output format

header_description.start_distance: Distance between the variant and phenotype start position (e.g., TSS)
header_description.end_distance: Distance between the variant and phenotype end position (only present if different from start position)
header_description.af: In-sample ALT allele frequency of the variant
header_description.ma_samples: Number of samples carrying at least one minor allele
header_description.pval_g: Nominal p-value of the genotype term
header_description.pval_i: Nominal p-value of the interaction variable
header_description.pval_gi: Nominal p-value of the interaction term
header_description.tests_emt: Effective number of independent variants (M_eff) estimated by eigenMT
